info.english_meaning: to take to accept to obtain
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' upAdAnam = svIkAraH  ' Ryantasya grahaRe gfhergfhayate tatrAnadantAd gfheH  BUvAdeH Sapi garhate Sni tu pade gfhRAtyagfhRIta ca  garhervA Rici nindanArTavizaye garhet taTA garhayet  BUvAdeH Sapi kutsanArTavizaye garherBaved garhate ' (Slo. 194) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: anumodana karanA gale lagAnA AliMgana karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'agnimUrDvaM prAYcaM pragfhRAti' (Sa॰brA॰6.4.3.10) Datta ityarTaH
'sa (prajApatiH) Atmano vapAmudaKidat tAmagnO prAgfhRAt' (tE॰saM॰2.1.1.4) prAkzipadityarTaH
'tasmE devA etAM DArAM prAgfhRan' (Sa॰brA॰9.3.2.1) niravapannityarTaH 'yAvanna caraRO BrAtuH… SirasA pragrahIzyAmi' (rA॰2.99.7) saMsprakzyAmItyarTaH
'ftvikpurohitAcAryAn satkftyAnavamanya ca yadA samyak pragfhRAti sa rAjYo Darma ucyate' (BA॰SAM॰91.43).. pragfhRAti=anugfhRAti=parigfhRAti=paripAlayati
'tena hi pragfhyantAM vAjinaH' (SA॰1) pragrahezu gfhyantAM saMyamyantAm ityarTaH kvacittena hi pragfhyantAmaBIzava iti pAWaH iha praSabdo'narTakaH
'kriyatAmasmAkamanunayapragrahaH' ( cAru॰1) pragrahaH parigrahaH svIkAraH
pragrahopagrahO vandyAm ityamaraH pragraha ityaparADasya hetoH saMyata ucyate pragraho vandI Bavati vandIti puMvyaktAvapi striyAm
'sarve kavacapragrahe ratAH' (hari॰) kavacabanDane kacagrahaRe vA lagnAH
'sAYjalipragrahamenamuvAca' (avadA॰jA॰6) sAYjalibanDamityarTaH 'kecidaYjalipragrahapuraHsaraM mArgamasyAvftya samavAtizWanta' (avadA॰SrezWijA॰)
'tato jagO paramaM japyaM sAYjalipragrahaH praBuH
'sAYjalipragrahA devI rOhiReyamupasTitA' (hari॰2.41.16)
na hi mucyate kaScitkaTaYcitpragrahaM gataH gajo vA mahizo vA'pi zazWe kAle narottama (BA॰vana॰180.16)..
'pragraho devadattasya' (pA॰3.3.52 sU॰kASikA) atra sAYjalItyAdizUdAhftizu sarvatra pragraho banDaM vakti
tulApragraheRa pracaranti vaRijaH tulApragrahastulAsUtram  DftAH pragrahAH
'avataratvAyuzmAn' (SA॰1) pragrahAH=raSmayaH=aBIzavaH=valgAH
'pAYcAlyapragraho droRaM sarvataH samavArayat' (BA॰droRa॰9.25) pAYcAlyo banDanarajjuryasya sa iti nIlakaRWaH
'srugbAhamAtrI vijYeyA vfttastu pragrahastayoH' (karmapradIpe) pragraho daRqaH

'tAmAryagaRasampUrRAM BaratapragrahAM saBAm' (rA॰2.82.1) BaratapragrahAmiti samastamekaM padamiti saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH taTA ca BarataH pragraho netA nAyako yasyAstAM BaratanAyakAm ityarTaH pragrahaSabdo netfvacana itIhEvADastAd vakzyate tilakakAro rAmastu BarataH pragrahAmiti vyAsena paWati prakfzwErvasizWAdiBigrahaH parigraho'DizWAnaM yasyAm iti klizwaM ca kalpayati
'asADunigraharataH sADUnAM pragrahe rataH' (BA॰SAM॰21.14) pragrahe=saNgrahe

'aparADaM sahetAlpaM tfpyedalpe'pi codaye mahopakAraM cADyakzaM pragraheRABipUjayet' (ko॰a॰2.7.25) pragraheRa=anugraheRa pAritozikeraRa dravyadAnena pragraheRa prakfzwagrahaRena yAvajjIvaM parigraheReti tu gaRapatiH
'ko mAM priyamivAtiTim BojayizyatyakarmaRyamapragrahamanAyakam' (rA॰2.3.33) apragrahaM nIvArAdisaNgraharahitamiti tilakaH yazwigrahaRapUrvakamArgapradarSakarahitamiti tu katakaH
'yaH pragrahAnugrahayoryaTAnyAyaM vicakzaRaH' (rA॰2.64.34) iha pragraho nigrahaM niyantraRamAha
'rAjopajIvinAM pragrahapradeSaBogaparihAraBaktavetanalABam' (kO॰a॰2.7.25) pragrahaH=pUjA mantripurohitAdIn prati pratyudgamanabahumAna iti gaRapatiH '
'meQIBUtaH svayaM rAjannigrahe pragrahe BavAn' (BA॰vana॰10.16) pragraho'nugrahaH
'vinigrahapragrahayoH pravfttirDarmoparoDaM na cakAra tasya' (pravadA॰mEtrI॰3) pragraho banDanam anugraha iti kaScit
'nigraheRa ca pApAnAM sADUnAM pragraheRa ca' (BA॰SAM॰349.34) pragraheRa=anugraheRa
'asatAM pragraho yatra satAM cEva vimAnanA daRqo dEvakftastatra madyaH patati dAruRaH' (kUrma॰pu॰pUrva॰15.27) pragrahaH saBAjanaM satkriyA svAgatavyAhAraH
'atiTipragraharatastaTAByAgatapUjakaH' (BA॰anu॰142.27) pragrahaH satkAraH
'DarmaSAstrAtigo mUQo durAmA pragrahaM gataH' (BA॰u॰92.3) pragraho nirbanDaH pratyaBiniveSaH

dOzkule vA viSezeRa kaTaYcit pragrahaM gatAH bAlaBAvAd vikurvanti prAyaSaH pramadAH SuBe (BA॰vana॰303.26).. pragraho nirbanDa iti nIlakaRWaH pragrahaM gatAH sADvAcaritA mitravatsatkftA iti saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH
'so'smAkaM vErapuruzo durmatiH pragrahaM gataH' (BA॰SAM॰7.33) pragraho banDanam
'nigrahe pragrahe samyaka yadA rAjA pravartate' (BA॰vana॰150.40) pragraho'nugrahaH

'tayoraTa BujADAtAnnigrahapragrahAttaTA AsItsuBImaH sampAto vajraparvatayoriva' (saBA॰23.23).. pragrahaH SatroruttAnapAtanArTaM pAdAkarzaRamiti nIlakaRWaH nigrahAnnirmokza iti tu saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH
'tayo rAjan BujAGAtanigrahapragrahAstaTA' (BA॰droRa॰142.42) pragraho galaharataka iti nIla॰
'tAni ratnOGakxptAni samAnupragrahARi ca' (hari॰2.29.7) pragrahaH patAkA sAnuruparideSaH
'pragrahaH sUryacandrayoruparAga' iti sUryamidDAnte (4.14)

'pramARaM sarvaBUtezu pragrahaM ca Bavizyasi' (BA॰SAM॰105.7) pragraho nAyakaH nIlakaRWastu pragraho BujatvaM (BujaBAvam) ityevaM vivfRoti medinIM ca pramARamudAharati— pragrahastu tulAsUtre vandyAM niyamane Buja iti kozapramito'pyayamarTaH prakfte nAtIva saMSlizyati
'pramARaM marvaBUtAnAM pragrahASca BavizyaTa' (BA॰anu॰35.6) pragrahA valgA iva
'halAyuDapragrahaRA (senA) (BA॰vana॰183.33) halAyuDaH pragrahaRo nAyako yasyA ityarTo BAti
'pramARaM sarvaBUtezu gatvA pragrahaRaM mahat' (BA॰SAM॰105.10) pragrahaRamAdaraH
yaTA hi raSmayo'Svasya dviradasyANkuSo yaTA narendraDarmo lokasya taTA pragrahaRaM matam (BA॰SAM॰56.5).. atra tu pragrahaRaM niyantraRamiti muktasaMSayam
'dInAnukampI DarmajYo nityaM pragrahavAYCuciH' (rA॰2.1.15) pragraho duzwanigraha indriyanigrahaSca
'pragrAhaM SaMsati' (E॰brA॰6.32) visanDIni padAnyuccArayati praSabdo viSleze pfTakkaraRe vartate
'plutapragfhyA aci nityam' (pA॰6.1.1.125) atrApyayamevArTaH
'pragfhya pARI devAn pUjayanti' (ni॰2.26.1) pragfhya=badDvA ayamevArTaH (SAM॰SrO॰1.6.10) ityatra
'pragfhya bAhUn kroSantyaH' (BA॰strI॰10.12) pragfhya=udyamya evamarTe'sya pragfhyaSabdasya bahuSaH prayogaH taTA codAharaRAni–
'pragfhya bAhU garjantI praviveSa mahAvanam' (rA॰3.18.24)
'pragfhya ruciraM bAhumidaM vacanamabravIt' (saBA॰68.26)
'pragfhya bAhUn kroSeta BagnA BagnAH pare iti' (BA॰SAM॰100.48)
'udyanmeGasvanaH kAle pragfhya vipulaM Bujam' (BA॰u॰91.16)
'tataSca taM balI BIzmaH pragfhya vipulaM Bujam' (BA॰anu॰167.25)
'evamuktvA tato bAhuM pragfhya puruzAdakaH' (BA॰Adi॰153.38)
'pragfhya bAhU vyalapannanATavat' (rA॰2.65.29) atra tu pragrahyetyaBihftyetyanena samAnABiDeyam
'pragfhya dantAviva nAgarAjaH' (BA॰vi॰54.19) pragfhya=AgraheRa

'pragfhItAYjaliH kiYcittasmAd deSAdapAkramat' (rA॰2.14.58) pragfhItAYjaliH=badDAYjaliH
'tezAmaYjalipadmAni pragfhItAni sarvaSaH' (rA॰2.3.1) pragfhItAni SirasA nibadDAni
'pragfhInastu yo'mAtyo nigfhItastvakAraREH' (BA॰vi॰4.40) pragfhItaH prakfzwatayA dAnamAnAdinA gfhItaH
'tasmAdrAjA pragfhItaH prajAsu' (BA॰SAM॰120.44) pragfhItaH snigDaH
'yaTAjyaM pragfhItamAlumpet sruco agnaye' (aTarva॰12.4.34) pragfhItaM pfTag gfhItam
'yayA tasyedaM carma pragfhItam' (avadA॰jA॰23) apanIya viyojya gfhItamityarTaH
'raSmIYSamIkatanayo mAtaliH pragrahIzyati' (vAmana pu0 69147) pragrahIzyati grahIzyati sAraTyaM karizyatItyarTaH
'tasmAdrAjA na pragfhRIta lubDam' (BA0 SAM0 12048) na pragfhRIta na saNgfhRIta nAtmIyaM kuryAt na tatra snihyet
'pragfhItAyuDasyeha mftyoriva mahAmfDe' (rA0 667107) praSabdo'tra nAntaramarTe karoti
'tAnyaYjalisahasrARi pragfhItAni nAgarEH vyAkoSAnIva padmAni dadarSa BaratAgrajaH' (rA0 612752).. pragfhItAni badDAni
'utpatya ca pragfhyoccErdevIM gaganamAsTitaH' (durgA0 1018) pragfhya=udyamya
'tato vilapya viratA BartuH pAdO pragfhya sA' (BA0 ASva0 8019) pragfhya=upasaMgfhya nipIqya
'pragfhya SirasA pAtrIm' (rA0 262) pragfhya DftvA
'ityuktaH kEkayIputraH kAkutsTena mahAtmanA pragfhya…' (rA0 21044) pragfhya gAQaM parizvajya

'yaH pragrahAnugrahayoryaTAnyAyaM vicakzaRaH' (rA0 2125) ayaM pustaketra DftapUrvaH pragraho niyantraRamiti yanniradeSi tanna samyak pragraho bAhulakena parigrahaM paripAlanaM tadrUpamanugrahaM vAha Aha cAtra maheSvaratIrTazwIkAkAraH-- praTamamAtmIyatvena parigrahaH pragrahaH parigfhItasya nErantaryoRAnuvartanamanugraha iti govindarAjopi taTA vyAkaroti

'yakzmaRA samagfhyata' (BA॰Adi॰102.70) rAjayakzmaRA'gfhyata=aByasUyata atra samSabdo viSezakfnna rujAM kartftAyAM kevalasya graho bahulaM prayogadarSanAt- 'SvetaketuM ha kilAso jagrAha' (CAM॰u॰) ityAdizu
'OzaDAni ca sarvARi mUlAni ca PalAni ca caturviDAMScEva vEdyAn saNgfhRIyAdviSezataH' (BA॰SAM॰69.59).. saNgfhRIyAt=samAnayet=samAharet=sannipAtayet

'aKilamiha kamaWaH saYjarIgfhyate ca BfSaM saNgfhRAti saNkocayati svAni gAtrARi yanmaDye capAlasya saNgfhItamiva Bavati' (Sa॰brA॰3.7.1.12) saNgfhItam=saNkucitam
